name: GNC Holdings, Inc.
description: GNC Holdings, Inc. is a leading global specialty retailer of health, wellness, and performance products, including vitamins, minerals, herbal supplements, sports nutrition, and dietary products. Founded in 1935 and headquartered in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, the company operates a vast network of corporate-owned retail stores, franchise locations, and e-commerce platforms. GNC is dedicated to helping consumers live well by providing high-quality, science-backed nutritional products and wellness solutions.
